context: Tests whether the solver applies swift-formatstyle guidance for exact decimal currency display and parsing in an iOS finance screen.

checklist.name: Decimal style
checklist.description: Uses Decimal formatting with a currency FormatStyle or equivalent Decimal.FormatStyle path for the amount.

checklist.name: No binary conversion
checklist.description: Does not convert the Decimal value through Double, Float, or another binary floating-point type for display or parsing.

checklist.name: Currency code
checklist.description: Uses an ISO 4217 currency code such as USD rather than hardcoding a currency symbol.

checklist.name: Parseable style
checklist.description: Shows or describes parsing the edited currency string back into Decimal with a matching FormatStyle or parse strategy.

checklist.name: Round-trip convention
checklist.description: Pairs formatting and parsing so the same currency and locale conventions are used in both directions.

checklist.name: SwiftUI format
checklist.description: Uses Text(_:format:) or otherwise keeps the FormatStyle at the SwiftUI formatting boundary instead of preformatted interpolation.

checklist.name: Locale QA
checklist.description: Mentions checking locale-sensitive separators, currency placement, or parsing behavior in representative locales.

checklist.name: Locale default
checklist.description: Avoids hardcoding a locale unless the output is explicitly for a fixed import/export contract.

checklist.name: No legacy formatter
checklist.description: Does not recommend a new NumberFormatter-based implementation for this iOS 17 code path.

checklist.name: Scoped ownership
checklist.description: Keeps the cleanup scoped to FormatStyle/parsing while treating broader translation or String Catalog work as separate.
